title: Purpose Limitation & Data Minimization
description: Implement Just-in-Time data access controls to restrict PII usage. Design field-level Time-To-Live (TTL) mechanisms to ensure PII retention for its declared processing purpose only.
objectives: Implement Just-in-Time data access controls to restrict PII usage.
Design field-level Time-To-Live (TTL) mechanisms to ensure PII retention for its declared processing purpose only.
